rulings.Case Title: DEAN TURCHI VS. RAYMOND DAVIS TREW ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 5, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT RAYMOND TREW, VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. A CALIFORNIA MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED. The eighth cause of action and paragraphs 64-65 are stricken - allegations are irrelevant and/or made without leave of Court. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEAN TURCHI VS. RAYMOND DAVIS TREW ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 5, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT RAYMOND TREW, VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. A CALIFORNIA DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to show undue influence per Robinson v. City of Manteca (2000) 78 Cal.App.4th 452. (SAC, paragraphs 38-62) =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ROUPPET VS. FERGUS O'SULLIVAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 5, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT FERGUS O'SULLIVAN, FOS TEAM, INC. DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend as to the second and third causes of action. Plaintiff fails to allege existence of a written rental agreement. See Ex. A to Fourth Amended Complaint. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ROUPPET VS. FERGUS O'SULLIVAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 5, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT FERGUS O'SULLIVAN, FOS TEAM, INC. Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Fourth Amended Complaint GRANTED. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD PIPKINS ET AL VS. LARRY D. ODBERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Consolidating Cases
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 5, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT STEVEN MATULICH Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Consolidating Cases GRANTED and October 18, 2016 Order is vacated. After consideration of the moving papers, opposition and reply on the motion to consolidate the Court Grants the motion to consolidate. Complex issue of title, which cannot be determined under summary unlawful detainer procedure, is involved. Hearing Required to address the payment of the maintenance and carrying costs (e.g. taxes, insurance, etc.) pending the resolution of the consolidated matter. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 160 10TH LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL VS. DIANE AMBLE RICHARDS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 5, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT DIANE RICHARDS Motion To Set Aside Judgment DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden under CCP 473 and/or CCP 473.5. The Court notes that no legal basis for the motion is cited by the moving party. =(501/REQ)
